title: API Guidelines Part C: API Development 2022
description: Comprehensive technical guidelines for API development covering design principles, HTTP standards, API types (REST, GraphQL, AsyncAPI, gRPC), layering architecture, and implementation standards. Establishes minimum deliverables including interface specifications, code, policies, tests, and SLAs for API projects.
